# Namibian hake stock assessments

This repository contains the annual Namibian hake stock assessment, its
data and control files, model diagnostics, and the code needed to
reproduce the results.

## Assessment documents

| Assessment | What it represents | Read online | Files |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| **2026 update** | Current assessment using data through 2026 | [2026 report](https://jimianelli.github.io/NamibianHake/articles/02-Namibian_hake_model_2026.md) | [PDF](https://jimianelli.github.io/NamibianHake/articles/02-Namibian_hake_model_2026.pdf) · [source](https://github.com/jimianelli/NamibianHake/blob/main/reports/02-Namibian_hake_model_2026.qmd) |
| **2025 assessment** | Previous-year baseline used for the bridge comparison | [2025 report](https://jimianelli.github.io/NamibianHake/articles/01-Namibian_hake_model_2025.md) | [archived source](https://github.com/jimianelli/NamibianHake/blob/main/reports/archive/01-Namibian_hake_model_2025.qmd) |
| **2024 assessment** | Historical assessment | — | [PDF](https://jimianelli.github.io/NamibianHake/articles/00-Namibian_hake_model_2024.pdf) · [archived source](https://github.com/jimianelli/NamibianHake/blob/main/reports/archive/00-Namibian_hake_model_2024.qmd) |

The [2025-to-2026 input-difference
report](https://github.com/jimianelli/NamibianHake/blob/main/reports/input_changes_2025_to_2026.md)
identifies every intended input change. Model diagnostics and key
results are available in the [`reports`
directory](https://github.com/jimianelli/NamibianHake/tree/main/reports).

## Reproduce the 2026 assessment

From the repository root, run the four numbered workflow scripts in
order:

``` sh
Rscript scripts/01_validate_inputs.R
Rscript scripts/02_run_assessment.R
Rscript scripts/03_check_models.R
Rscript scripts/04_render_report.R
```

These stages validate and compare the annual inputs, compile and run the
ADMB models, classify convergence, write compact CSV summaries, and
render the HTML and PDF reports. The main machine-readable outputs are:

- `reports/input_changes_2025_to_2026.html`
- `reports/model_diagnostics_2026.csv`
- `reports/key_results_2026.csv`
- `vignettes/02-Namibian_hake_model_2026.html`
- `vignettes/02-Namibian_hake_model_2026.pdf`

The dome-shaped selectivity and steepness 0.5 sensitivities currently
fail the declared diagnostic criteria. Their estimates are retained for
troubleshooting but excluded from inference.

For the exact 2025 reference state, use the immutable
[`baseline-2025`](https://github.com/jimianelli/NamibianHake/releases/tag/baseline-2025)
tag.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`PlotAgeFit()`](https://jimianelli.github.io/NamibianHake/reference/PlotAgeFit.md)
  : Plot Age Fit

- [`plot_sel()`](https://jimianelli.github.io/NamibianHake/reference/plot_sel.md)
  : Plot Selectivity

- [`read_admb()`](https://jimianelli.github.io/NamibianHake/reference/read_admb.md)
  : Read ADMB output files

- [`read_ctl()`](https://jimianelli.github.io/NamibianHake/reference/read_ctl.md)
  : Read ADMB .ctl file

- [`read_fit()`](https://jimianelli.github.io/NamibianHake/reference/read_fit.md)
  : Read ADMB .par, .std, and .cor file and return an R object of type
  'list' of estimates and correlations

- [`read_psv()`](https://jimianelli.github.io/NamibianHake/reference/read_psv.md)
  : Read ADMB .psv file

- [`read_re_output()`](https://jimianelli.github.io/NamibianHake/reference/read_re_output.md)
  : Read output file from the random effects (RE) model into a
  data.frame

- [`read_rep()`](https://jimianelli.github.io/NamibianHake/reference/read_rep.md)
  : Read ADMB .rep file

- [`test_re_species()`](https://jimianelli.github.io/NamibianHake/reference/test_re_species.md)
  :

  Test the RE on a single species. This compares a current ADMB
  univariate run to a previous run. It tests *continuity* not
  correctness

- [`write_re_input()`](https://jimianelli.github.io/NamibianHake/reference/write_re_input.md)
  : Write an input file for the RE model
